mapper.select: SELECT oa.id, oa.group_name, oa.created_at, COUNT(ol.article_id) AS number FROM o_blog.o_article_group oa LEFT JOIN o_blog.o_article_group_link ol ON oa.id = ol.group_id WHERE oa.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY oa.id

SELECT oag.id, oag.group_name, oag.created_at, COUNT(ogl.article_id) AS number FROM o_blog.o_article_group_link ogl LEFT JOIN o_blog.o_article_group oag ON ogl.group_id = oag.id WHERE ogl.article_id = #{articleId} GROUP BY oag.id
